leadText: Sludge Mound (Japanese: ヘドロ台地 Sludge Plateau) is an area located in the southern region of the Crimson Mirelands of Hisui. It is bordered by Gapejaw Bog to the west and Ursa's Ring to the east. It is also accessible from the Bogbound Camp to the north, when it is established as part of Request 31: "Setting Up the Bogbound Camp". Ursaluna, who is watched by warden Calaba of the Pearl Clan, is found here. He is fought here as part of Mission 8: "Arezu's Predicament", where the player gains access to it as a Ride Pokémon when he is rid of his frenzy.

sections.title: Geography
sections.text: Geography [ edit | edit source ] The primary feature of the Sludge Mound is a massive, rounded plateau that has an appearance similar to a crater. It forms an arena-like space. The edge of the mound is riddled with dead tree trunks. It sits in a dense forest of dead trees and ore deposits.
